backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the pickleball app implementing session management, player profiles, court assignments, and match results with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for session creation failures, linking the affected file (CreateSession.tsx) to test requirement REQ-21 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root into a div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with auth-guard redirects for all app pages, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster, and exports the root App component.
frontend/src/components/AllRoundsSchedul: Accordion-style component that displays all scheduled rounds with expandable court assignments and waitlists, highlighting the current round and resolving player IDs to display names.
frontend/src/components/CourtAssignmentC: Card component showing a single court's Team A vs Team B player slots with avatar initials, highlights for the current player, and empty slot indicators.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines two layout components: `Layout` (a page shell with optional header, back button, and footer) and `AppHeader` (a sticky app-wide header with logo and logout button).
frontend/src/components/MatchResultSubmi: Renders a card UI for submitting a match result (Team A or Team B win), showing a confirmation state after submission and an optional skip button.
Displays a player's name, DUPR rating, and win/loss/win-rate statistics in a card, or a 'no matches' message if no games have been played.
frontend/src/components/SessionCodeDispl: Shows a pickleball session code with copy-to-clipboard and native share functionality, available in both compact and full card variants.
frontend/src/components/SessionConfigFor: A form component for configuring a new session by selecting the number of courts (1–10) via increment/decrement buttons, then submitting to create the session.
frontend/src/components/WaitlistPanel.ts: Renders a numbered waitlist of players waiting for a court, highlighting the current user's entry and showing an empty state when no one is waiting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor calls including session management, player operations, match results, and user profiles, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Inter and Outfit fonts, and defines a pickleball-themed design token system (green/yellow palette) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/storage.ts: localStorage utility module for persisting and retrieving player profiles, current session info, and per-session player name mappings with backward-compatible aliases.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility helpers for class name merging (cn), clipboard copying, DUPR rating formatting, and principal string shortening.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateSession.tsx: Page component for hosting a new pickleball session, allowing court count selection and displaying the generated session code with a link to the host dashboard after creation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying the app hero section, active session resume card, and navigation buttons for creating/joining sessions and managing the player profile.
Host dashboard page for managing a session, including adding players, triggering allocation, viewing court assignments, waitlist, and all-rounds schedule via tabbed layout.
frontend/src/pages/JoinSession.tsx: Page component that lets a player enter a session code to join an existing session, then navigates them to the player session view on success.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page offering Internet Identity sign-in or guest access, storing the auth choice in sessionStorage and redirecting to home after authentication.
frontend/src/pages/PlayerSessionView.tsx: Player-facing session view showing court assignments, waitlist status, and a match result submission form for the currently authenticated player.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form page for creating a new player profile with a name and optional DUPR rating, saving it to both the backend and local storage before navigating to the intended destination.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileView.tsx: Displays the current player's profile (name and DUPR rating) with an inline edit mode that validates and persists changes to local storage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, fonts, border radii, shadows) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing a pickleball session-management mobile app, its architectural notes, existing features, and known bugs (profile/session creation failures).
